tags.name: MP Cat MB Maternity and Nursing

product.description:
Product Highlights:
- Enable breastfeeding when latching on is difficult or painful or if you have flat or inverted nipples
- Protect sensitive, dry or cracked nipples during breastfeeding
- Made from transparent, ultra-thin, soft silicone that's comfortable on sensitive skin
- Safe and taste-free for your baby
- Shape maximises skin contact between you and your baby
- BPA free
What's in the box?
2 x Contact nipple shields
1 x handy box
Product Dimensions: 2.5 x 2.5 x 2.5 cm
Item Weight: 30 g
Material Type: Silicone
Size Guide
Available in three sizes: S/16 mm, M/20 mm or L/24 mm.

metaData.Key Information:
- Medela Contact Nipple Shield.
- Nipple shields make breastfeeding possible when latching on is difficult or painful by protecting sore nipples and helping your baby attach more easily.
- Medela Contact Nipple Shields help you breastfeed your baby if you have flat, inverted or sore nipples or an overactive let-down.
metaData.Preparation:
How to use:
After washing your hands with drinking-quality water and drying them thoroughly, grip the wings of the Contact nipple shield to guide it into place. Moistening the shield with drinking-quality water will help it stick. See the Contact nipple shield instructions for full details of how to put them on.The nipple shield should fit comfortably on your nipple without pinching - Medela nipple shields come in three sizes, so you can find the best fit for your type of nipple. Remember you'll need to clean them after each use and disinfect once a day - this is often easiest using a microwave sanitising bag - see instructions for details of cleaning and sanitising. Contact nipple shields come with a convenient carry case so you can keep them safe between uses.

product.name: MEDELA Contact Nipple Shield 24mm - Size L

metaData.Key Information: Your solution to staying dry and comfortable! These disposable nursing pads have a special absorbent polymer and stay-dry honeycomb lining that works to draw milk away into the core of the pad, keeping skin and clothing dry. Even with the heaviest flow, these pads can maintain their form and smooth shape, giving mums the reassurance that it will always remain discrete and undetectable under clothing.<
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool dry area

metaData.Key Information: Designed to help breastfeeding mums with latch-on issues, as well as those with flat, inverted, sore or cracked nipples. This newly improved nipple shield has a unique butterfly shape to maximise the skin-to-skin contact between mother and baby. The ultra-soft and thin silicone shell adheres closely to the skin, protects sore breasts and allows you to continue breastfeeding with less pain. 2pcs per pack.<<
metaData.Preparation: Designed to help breastfeeding mums with latch-on issues, as well as those with flat, inverted, sore or cracked nipples. This newly improved nipple shield has a unique butterfly shape to maximise the skin-to-skin contact between mother and baby. The ultra-soft and thin silicone shell adheres closely to the skin, protects sore breasts and allows you to continue breastfeeding with less pain. 2pcs per pack.

product.description:
• effective nipple treatment

• 100% medical grade silicone

• natural organic aloe vera

• up to 30x reusable

• vegan and cruelty-free

• made in germany

metaData.Ingredients: Dimethicone (Carrier Material), Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice
metaData.Key Information:
• For the care of sore nipples during breastfeeding.
• The highly effective natural aloe vera has remarkable regenerative power.
• It promotes cell production, moisturises the skin at the cellular level, and has an anti-inflammatory and soothing effect.
metaData.Preparation:
• The application area should be dry and clean
• Remove the pad from the packaging
• Put it gently with the adhesive side on your breast area
• Use it regularly for at least one hour
• After the application you can store the pads on the foil and in the sachet bag. Clean them occasionally with mild soap and let them dry in the air - then they will accompany you up to 30 times.
metaData.SAP Product Name: Apricot Beauty Nipple Pads With Aloe Vera
metaData.Storage Information: Cool dry place away from direct sunlight.
